race.comment: CLEARLY GEORGE (3) ran fourth at his latest appearance over 1710m at Ipswich, clocking in 1.75 lengths from the winner. Expecting a bold showing. BLACK 'N' DEADLY (12) tasted defeat last start when sixth over 1350m at Warwick, beaten 4.5 lengths. Suitably placed so anticipating a better run. SOCK'EMSID (2) last start finished sixth over 1500m at this track. Is better than that run suggests and can sneak into the finish. HUSSY EMPRESS (10) has been out of the money of late including last time out when 14th over 1400m at Sunshine Coast six-and-a-half weeks ago. Suited here and look for an improved run.
